results.title: Turn Your Recipes Into a Cookbook Your Audience Can Buy

# Terms of Service

Effective Date: September 2025

## Welcome to Culinage

The Services are provided by Culinage, Inc ("Culinage" or "we"), located in the United States of America.

These Terms of Service ("Terms") establish the agreement between you and Culinage for accessing and using our websites, mobile applications, recipe preservation tools, cookbook creation services, and related features (collectively, the "Services"). These Terms apply to all users, including:

* Account holders and invited members or collaborators
* Visitors browsing our website or reading our content
* Recipients of our communications, newsletters, or marketing materials
* Purchasers of digital subscriptions and/or printed cookbooks

For additional information about specific features and common questions, please visit our FAQ section. Those answers are incorporated by reference into these Terms. By accessing or using our Services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy, available at [https://culinage.app/privacy-policy](/privacy-policy).

**Age Requirement:** You must be at least 13 years of age to use our Services. By using the Services, you represent that you meet this age requirement. If you are between 13 and 18 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction), you confirm that you have obtained permission from your parent or legal guardian to use the Services and that they have reviewed and agreed to these Terms on your behalf.

IMPORTANT LEGAL NOTICE: THESE TERMS INCLUDE A BINDING ARBITRATION CLAUSE AND CLASS ACTION WAIVER THAT AFFECT YOUR LEGAL RIGHTS. THESE PROVISIONS REQUIRE DISPUTES TO BE RESOLVED THROUGH INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION RATHER THAN COURT PROCEEDINGS OR CLASS ACTIONS. ARBITRATION LIMITS YOUR ABILITY TO ENGAGE IN DISCOVERY AND ELIMINATES YOUR RIGHT TO A JURY TRIAL. PLEASE REVIEW THE ARBITRATION SECTION CAREFULLY.

Please carefully review these Terms, our Privacy Policy, and our FAQs before using the Services. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms or our Privacy Policy, you must not access or use the Services.

## Your Use of Our Services

### Permitted Uses

Our Services are designed to help preserve culinary traditions, organize recipes, document food memories, and create printed cookbooks. You may use the Services for these personal, non-commercial purposes in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.

### Prohibited Conduct

To maintain a safe and respectful environment for all users, you agree not to:

* Use the Services to harass, threaten, stalk, abuse, defame, or intimidate any person
* Upload or share content that is unlawful, harmful, threatening, abusive, hateful, racially or ethnically offensive, sexually explicit, defamatory, invasive of privacy, or otherwise objectionable
* Infringe upon the intellectual property rights, privacy rights, or other rights of any third party
* Transmit any viruses, malware, worms, trojan horses, or other harmful or destructive code
* Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any portion of the Services, other user accounts, or any computer systems or networks connected to the Services
* Engage in any automated use of the Services, including through bots, scrapers, or similar data gathering tools, without our express written permission
* Impersonate any person or entity, or falsely state or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity
* Interfere with or disrupt the Services or servers or networks connected to the Services
* Use the Services for any commercial purpose without our prior written consent
* Reproduce, sell, resell, or exploit any portion of the Services without our express written permission

We reserve the right to investigate violations of these Terms and may take appropriate action, including but not limited to removing content, suspending or terminating accounts, and reporting violations to law enforcement authorities. We may also cooperate with law enforcement investigations.

### Account Registration and Security

To access certain features of the Services, you may need to create an account or be invited to join a primary account. When creating or maintaining your account, you agree to:

* Provide accurate, current, and complete information
* Maintain and promptly update your account information to keep it accurate and current
* Maintain the security and confidentiality of your login credentials
* Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to or use of your account
* Take responsibility for all activities that occur under your account

You may not share your account credentials with others or allow others to access your account. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to protect your account information.

### Collaborator Accounts

Culinage allows you to invite collaborators to contribute to your recipe collection. As the account holder who invites others, you are responsible for:

* Ensuring invited users agree to these Terms
* Managing permissions and access levels for invited users
* Any content uploaded or actions taken by invited users within your family account

Invited users must also comply with these Terms and may have separate responsibilities based on their role within the family account.

## Culinage Pro

### Overview

Culinage Pro is a platform that enables food creators to publish and sell print-on-demand cookbooks to their audience. This section applies specifically to creators who use Culinage Pro services.

### Creator Accounts

To use Culinage Pro, you must create a creator account and be accepted into our pilot program or general program. Creator accounts are subject to additional terms and may require verification of your identity and eligibility. We reserve the right to accept or reject applications at our sole discretion.

As a creator, you are responsible for:

* Maintaining the accuracy of your creator profile and account information
* Ensuring all content you publish complies with these Terms and applicable laws
* Providing accurate tax and payment information for payouts
* Complying with all applicable laws and regulations related to selling products

### Content Ownership and Licensing

You retain full ownership of all recipes, photographs, text, and other content you create and publish through Culinage Pro ("Creator Content"). By publishing Creator Content through Culinage Pro, you grant Culinage a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to:

* Reproduce, format, and print your cookbook through our print-on-demand partners
* Display your cookbook on landing pages and in our marketplace (if applicable)
* Process orders and fulfill customer purchases
* Use your cookbook cover and preview pages for marketing purposes (with your consent)

This license continues for as long as your cookbook is available for sale through Culinage Pro. You may remove your cookbook from sale at any time, subject to fulfillment of existing orders.

### Print-on-Demand and Fulfillment

Culinage Pro uses third-party print-on-demand partners to produce and ship physical cookbooks. We handle all aspects of production, fulfillment, and customer service related to your cookbook sales. You acknowledge that:

* Books are printed only when customers place orders (no inventory is maintained)
* Production and shipping times may vary based on location and demand
* We are not responsible for delays caused by third-party printers or shipping carriers
* We will replace books with significant printing defects or shipping damage
* You are responsible for ensuring your content is print-ready and meets our quality standards

### Landing Pages and Checkout

Each cookbook published through Culinage Pro receives a hosted landing page and secure checkout experience. We handle all aspects of payment processing, order management, and customer support. You agree that:

* We may customize the landing page design to optimize conversions
* Payment processing is handled by our secure third-party payment processors
* We will provide you with a shareable link to your cookbook's landing page
* You may not create competing checkout flows or redirect customers away from our hosted checkout
* We reserve the right to modify landing page designs and checkout flows to improve user experience

### Pricing and Profit Sharing

You set the retail price for your cookbook. Profit sharing is calculated on net revenue after printing costs, payment processing fees, and other applicable costs. The specific profit-sharing percentage depends on your selected plan and will be disclosed when you join Culinage Pro.

Payouts are processed monthly for earnings above the minimum payout threshold. You are responsible for:

* Providing accurate payment information (bank account, tax ID, etc.)
* Reporting and paying any applicable taxes on your earnings
* Understanding that profit-sharing percentages may vary based on your plan and may be updated with notice

We reserve the right to adjust pricing structures, profit-sharing models, or fees with at least 30 days' notice to existing creators. Changes will apply to new sales after the notice period.

### Sales Analytics and Reporting

Culinage Pro provides sales analytics and reporting tools to help you understand your sales performance. Analytics data is provided for informational purposes and may not reflect real-time sales due to processing delays. We are not responsible for any decisions you make based on analytics data.

### Creator Responsibilities

As a creator, you represent and warrant that:

* All Creator Content is original or you have obtained all necessary rights and permissions
* Your cookbook does not infringe on any third-party intellectual property rights
* All recipes and content are accurate and safe to follow
* You have the right to sell your cookbook through our platform
* You will not use Culinage Pro to sell prohibited content or engage in fraudulent activity

### Termination of Creator Account

We may suspend or terminate your creator account at any time for violation of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or other reasons at our discretion. Upon termination:

* Your cookbooks will be removed from sale (existing orders will still be fulfilled)
* You will receive final payouts for completed sales, subject to any holds or disputes
* You may export your creator content and sales data

You may also terminate your creator account at any time by contacting us. Upon termination by you, we will process final payouts and remove your cookbooks from sale after a reasonable transition period.

## Subscriptions and Purchases

### Pricing and Payment

We offer various subscription plans and products, including digital-only access and printed cookbook options. Current pricing is displayed on our website and may be changed at any time. When you make a purchase, you agree to provide accurate and complete payment information and authorize us to charge the applicable fees to your chosen payment method.

All fees are stated in U.S. dollars unless otherwise specified. You are responsible for any applicable taxes, and we will collect sales tax where required by law.

### Subscription Terms

Subscription fees are billed in advance on a recurring basis (monthly or annually, depending on your chosen plan). By subscribing, you authorize us to automatically charge your payment method at the beginning of each billing period until you cancel your subscription. Subscription renewals occur automatically unless you cancel before the renewal date.

We may modify subscription pricing with at least 30 days' advance notice to existing subscribers. Price changes will take effect at the start of your next billing cycle after the notice period. If you do not agree to a price change, you may cancel your subscription before the new price takes effect.

### Cancellation and Refunds

You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings or by contacting our support team. Upon cancellation, you will continue to have access to the Services through the end of your current billing period, but your subscription will not renew.

Subscription fees are generally non-refundable except as required by law or as specifically stated in our refund policy. Please refer to our FAQ section for detailed information about refunds, returns, and our satisfaction guarantee.

### Printed Cookbooks

When you order a printed cookbook, additional fees may apply beyond your subscription. Printed books are produced through third-party printing partners. We will make reasonable efforts to ensure quality printing and timely delivery, but we cannot guarantee specific delivery dates.

We will replace books that arrive with significant printing defects or shipping damage. To request a replacement, please contact us with photographic documentation of the issue within 30 days of receipt.

### Promotional Codes and Discounts

We may offer promotional codes, discounts, or special offers from time to time. These promotions are subject to specific terms and conditions, which will be provided with the offer. We reserve the right to modify or cancel any promotion at our discretion and may refuse to honor promotional codes that we determine were obtained or used fraudulently or in violation of the promotion terms.

### Right to Refuse Service

We reserve the right, with or without notice, to limit order quantities, discontinue products or services, refuse service to any customer, or cancel any order for any reason, including suspected fraud, abuse of promotions, or violation of these Terms.

## Your Content and Our AI Tools

### Content Ownership

You retain full ownership of all recipes, photographs, videos, stories, and other materials you upload to the Services ("Your Content"). By uploading Your Content, you grant Culinage a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, sublicensable, and transferable license to use, reproduce, distribute, prepare derivative works of, display, and perform Your Content in connection with providing the Services and for any other purposes you explicitly authorize (such as marketing, if you opt in).

This license allows us to:

* Store and process Your Content on our servers
* Use AI and machine learning tools to transcribe recipes and enhance Your Content
* Create printed cookbooks containing Your Content
* Display Your Content to you and users you invite to collaborate
* Create backups and archival copies of Your Content
* Provide technical support and troubleshoot issues
* Use aggregated, de-identified data derived from Your Content to improve our Services

While you retain ownership of Your Content, any templates, layouts, formatting tools, or organizational structures we provide are proprietary to Culinage and remain our property.

### AI-Powered Features

Our Services include artificial intelligence and machine learning features that can transcribe handwritten recipes, format ingredients lists, suggest cooking times, and provide other enhancements. While we strive for accuracy, AI-generated content may contain errors or inaccuracies.

**You are solely responsible for reviewing and approving all AI-generated content before finalizing your recipes or ordering printed cookbooks.** We are not liable for any errors, omissions, or issues arising from AI-processed content. Always verify that AI transcriptions and suggestions are accurate before using them.

### Your Responsibilities for Content

You are fully responsible for Your Content and any consequences of uploading or sharing it. You represent and warrant that:

* You own Your Content or have all necessary rights, licenses, and permissions to upload and share it
* Your Content does not infringe or violate any third party's intellectual property rights, publicity rights, privacy rights, or other legal rights
* Your Content complies with all applicable laws and regulations
* Your Content does not contain false, misleading, or deceptive information
* If Your Content includes images of other people, you have obtained their consent to upload and share those images (and parental consent if they are minors)

If you opt to allow us to use Your Content for marketing purposes, you additionally confirm that all individuals appearing in such content have provided consent for such marketing use (including parental consent for minors).

### Content Moderation

While we do not proactively monitor user content, we may review content in connection with providing customer support, investigating reported violations, or for other legitimate business purposes. If we become aware of content that violates these Terms or applicable law, we may remove, filter, or refuse to display such content without prior notice.

We are not obligated to monitor or moderate user content, and our review of some content does not imply that we review all content or that we have any obligation to do so.

### Content Backup and Data Loss

While we implement backup systems to protect user data, we are not responsible for any loss, corruption, or destruction of Your Content. You are strongly encouraged to maintain your own backup copies of Your Content. We recommend regularly exporting your recipes and downloading copies of your photos and materials.

### Feedback and Suggestions

If you provide feedback, suggestions, or ideas about the Services, you grant us the right to use such feedback without any obligation or compensation to you. We may implement your suggestions or not, at our sole discretion.

## Third-Party Services and Integrations

### External Services

The Services may integrate with, link to, or contain content from third-party websites, applications, or services ("Third-Party Services"). These may include payment processors, social media platforms, cloud storage services, printing partners, and analytics tools.

We do not control and are not responsible for Third-Party Services, including their content, privacy practices, or terms of use. The inclusion of any link or integration does not imply our endorsement or approval. Your use of Third-Party Services is at your own risk and subject to the terms and conditions of those services.

### Social Media Connections

You may optionally connect your account with social media platforms (such as Facebook or Google) to import photos, contacts, or other content ("Social Content"). By connecting these accounts, you grant us permission to access and use your Social Content solely to provide the Services to you.

You can disconnect your social media accounts at any time through your account settings. Your relationship with each social media platform is governed by your agreements with that platform, not by these Terms.

## Intellectual Property Rights

### Our Intellectual Property

The Services, including all software, designs, text, graphics, logos, icons, images, audio clips, video, data compilations, and the overall "look and feel" of the Services, are owned by or licensed to Culinage and are protected by copyright, trademark, patent, and other intellectual property laws.

Your use of the Services does not grant you ownership of any intellectual property rights in the Services or any content you access through the Services (except Your Content, which you own as described above). You may not:

* Copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of the Services
* Reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract the source code of the Services
* Remove, obscure, or alter any copyright, trademark, or other proprietary notices
* Use our trademarks, logos, or branding without written permission

If you wish to use our branding or intellectual property for any purpose, please contact us at support@culinage.app for permission.

### Trademarks

"Culinage" and our logo are trademarks of Culinage, Inc. Other product and service names mentioned in the Services may be trademarks of their respective owners.

## Copyright and DMCA Compliance

We respect intellectual property rights and expect our users to do the same. We comply with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act ("DMCA") and will respond to valid notices of copyright infringement.

If you believe that content on our Services infringes your copyright, please send a written notice to our Copyright Agent with the following information:

**Copyright Agent:**

Culinage, Inc
Email: support@culinage.app

Your notice must include:

* Your physical or electronic signature (or signature of person authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner)
* Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to have been infringed
* Identification of the infringing material and information reasonably sufficient to locate it on our Services
* Your contact information (address, telephone number, and email address)
* A statement that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law
* A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information in your notice is accurate and that you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner

We may terminate accounts of users who are repeat copyright infringers.

## Privacy and Data Protection

Your privacy is important to us. Our Privacy Policy, available at [https://culinage.app/privacy-policy](/privacy-policy), explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information.

By using the Services, you consent to our collection and use of your information as described in the Privacy Policy. Please review the Privacy Policy carefully to understand our privacy practices.

We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, but no method of transmission or storage is completely secure. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.

## Disclaimers and Limitations

### No Warranties

We strive to provide high-quality Services, but we cannot guarantee perfection. THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

We do not warrant that:

* The Services will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free
* The Services will meet your specific requirements or expectations
* The results obtained from using the Services will be accurate, reliable, or complete
* AI-generated transcriptions or suggestions will be error-free
* Any errors or defects in the Services will be corrected
* Your Content will be permanently preserved or never lost

### Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, CULINAGE, ITS AFFILIATES, OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, SUPPLIERS, AND LICENSORS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO DAMAGES FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, REVENUE, DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, RESULTING FROM:

* Your access to, use of, or inability to access or use the Services
* Any conduct or content of any third party on or through the Services
* Any content obtained from the Services
* Unauthorized access, use, or alteration of your Content
* Errors in AI transcriptions or recipe processing
* Defects in printed cookbooks beyond our control
* Loss or corruption of Your Content

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, OUR TOTAL LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ANY CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THESE TERMS OR THE SERVICES SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNT YOU PAID TO CULINAGE IN THE TWELVE MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM OR (B) ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100).

THESE LIMITATIONS APPLY WHETHER THE ALLEGED LIABILITY IS BASED ON CONTRACT, TORT, NEGLIGENCE, STRICT LIABILITY, OR ANY OTHER BASIS, AND EVEN IF CULINAGE HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.

Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of certain warranties or liabilities, so some of the above limitations may not apply to you.

### Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Culinage, Culinage, Inc, and their respective officers, directors, employees, agents, affiliates, successors, and assigns from and against any and all losses, damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising from or related to:

* Your use of or inability to use the Services
* Your violation of these Terms
* Your violation of any rights of another person or entity
* Your Content, including any claims that Your Content infringes or violates any third-party rights
* Any misrepresentation made by you

## Dispute Resolution and Arbitration

PLEASE READ THIS SECTION CAREFULLY. IT AFFECTS YOUR LEGAL RIGHTS, INCLUDING YOUR RIGHT TO FILE A LAWSUIT IN COURT.

### Informal Resolution

Before initiating arbitration or any legal proceeding, you agree to first contact us at support@culinage.app to attempt to resolve the dispute informally. We will attempt to resolve any disputes amicably and in good faith. Please provide a detailed description of the dispute and your desired resolution.

### Binding Arbitration

If we cannot resolve a dispute informally, you and Culinage agree that any dispute, claim, or controversy arising out of or relating to these Terms or the Services (collectively, "Disputes") will be resolved exclusively through binding arbitration rather than in court, except that either party may bring an individual action in small claims court if the claim qualifies.

The arbitration will be administered by the American Arbitration Association ("AAA") under its Commercial Arbitration Rules and, where appropriate, the AAA's Supplementary Procedures for Consumer Related Disputes. The arbitration will be conducted by a single arbitrator in accordance with the AAA rules. The arbitrator's decision will be final and binding, and judgment on the award may be entered in any court of competent jurisdiction.

THERE IS NO JUDGE OR JURY IN ARBITRATION. ARBITRATION PROCEDURES ARE SIMPLER AND MORE LIMITED THAN COURT PROCEDURES. THE ARBITRATOR'S DECISIONS ARE SUBJECT TO VERY LIMITED REVIEW BY A COURT.

### Class Action Waiver

YOU AND CULINAGE AGREE THAT EACH MAY BRING CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER ONLY IN YOUR OR ITS INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY AND NOT AS A PLAINTIFF OR CLASS MEMBER IN ANY PURPORTED CLASS, CONSOLIDATED, COLLECTIVE, REPRESENTATIVE, OR PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERAL ACTION.

Unless both you and Culinage agree otherwise, the arbitrator may not consolidate more than one person's claims and may not preside over any form of representative or class proceeding. If a court determines that this class action waiver is unenforceable, then the arbitration agreement will be deemed null and void with respect to the claims that cannot be arbitrated on an individual basis, and those claims must be litigated in court.

### Location and Costs

The arbitration will take place in a mutually convenient location or remotely via video conference. Each party will be responsible for their own costs associated with arbitration, including attorney fees, unless otherwise required by applicable law or determined by the arbitrator.

### Opt-Out Right

You have the right to opt out of this arbitration agreement by sending written notice of your decision to opt out to support@culinage.app within 30 days of first accepting these Terms. Your notice must include your name, address, email address, and a clear statement that you wish to opt out of the arbitration agreement. If you opt out, all other parts of these Terms will continue to apply.

## Term and Termination

### Term

These Terms remain in effect while you use the Services or maintain an account with us.

### Termination by You

You may terminate your account and stop using the Services at any time by contacting us at hello@culinage.app or through your account settings. Upon termination by you, you may request a copy of Your Content before your account is deleted. We will make reasonable efforts to provide you with Your Content, though we cannot guarantee availability of all historical data.

### Termination by Us

We may suspend or terminate your access to the Services at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice. Reasons for termination may include, but are not limited to:

* Violation of these Terms or any policies
* Suspected fraudulent, abusive, or illegal activity
* Extended periods of inactivity
* Requests by law enforcement or government agencies
* Discontinuation of the Services or specific features

If we terminate your account for cause, we may (but are not obligated to) provide you with a digital backup of Your Content. If we terminate your account without cause or discontinue the Services, we will provide reasonable notice and an opportunity to export Your Content where technically feasible. We may also provide prorated refunds for unused subscription periods at our discretion.

### Effects of Termination

Upon termination of your account:

* Your access to the Services will immediately cease
* Your Content may be deleted from our servers (subject to our backup and retention policies)
* You will remain responsible for any outstanding fees or obligations
* Provisions of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination will continue to apply, including ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnification, limitations of liability, and dispute resolution

## Changes to Services and Terms

### Service Modifications

We are continuously improving and evolving our Services. We may add new features, modify existing features, or discontinue features at any time. We may also temporarily suspend the Services for maintenance or updates.

If we decide to discontinue a significant portion of the Services, we will provide reasonable advance notice (where technically and commercially feasible) and an opportunity for you to export Your Content.

### Changes to These Terms

We may revise these Terms from time to time to reflect changes in our Services, legal requirements, or business practices. When we make changes, we will post the updated Terms on our website and update the "Effective Date" at the top of these Terms.

For material changes that significantly affect your rights, we will provide at least 30 days' advance notice by email (to the address associated with your account) or through a prominent notice in the Services. Your continued use of the Services after the effective date of revised Terms constitutes your acceptance of the changes.

If you do not agree to the modified Terms, your sole remedy is to discontinue using the Services and, if applicable, cancel your subscription before the changes take effect.

## General Provisions

### Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and any other policies or guidelines referenced herein, constitute the entire agreement between you and Culinage regarding the Services and supersede all prior agreements, understandings, and communications, whether written or oral.

### Assignment

You may not assign or transfer these Terms or your rights under these Terms, in whole or in part, without our prior written consent. We may assign these Terms or any rights under these Terms without restriction, including to any affiliate or in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets.

### Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid, unlawful, or unenforceable, that provision will be enforced to the maximum extent permissible, and the remaining provisions will remain in full force and effect.

### Waiver

Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not constitute a waiver of that or any other right or provision. No waiver of any provision of these Terms will be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such provision or any other provision.

### Force Majeure

We will not be liable for any delay or failure to perform any obligation under these Terms due to events beyond our reasonable control, including but not limited to acts of God, natural disasters, war, terrorism, riots, pandemics, labor disputes, government actions, internet or telecommunications failures, or failures of third-party services.

### Governing Law and Venue

These Terms and any disputes arising out of or related to the Services will be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States and the state in which Culinage, Inc is organized, without regard to conflict of law principles.

Subject to the arbitration agreement above, any legal action or proceeding arising out of or related to these Terms or the Services will be brought exclusively in the federal or state courts located in the jurisdiction where Culinage, Inc maintains its principal place of business, and you consent to personal jurisdiction in those courts.

### Export Controls

You agree to comply with all applicable export and re-export control laws and regulations, including the Export Administration Regulations maintained by the U.S. Department of Commerce. You represent that you are not located in a country subject to a U.S. Government embargo or designated as a "terrorist supporting" country, and that you are not listed on any U.S. Government list of prohibited or restricted parties.

### Electronic Communications

By using the Services, you consent to receive electronic communications from us, including emails, notifications through the Services, and other electronic messages. You agree that all agreements, notices, disclosures, and other communications that we provide electronically satisfy any legal requirement that such communications be in writing.

### Accessibility

We are committed to making our Services accessible to all users. If you experience any difficulty accessing any part of the Services, please contact us at hello@culinage.app and we will work with you to provide the information or functionality you seek.

### No Third-Party Beneficiaries

These Terms do not and are not intended to confer any rights or remedies upon any person other than you and Culinage.

## Contact Us

We value your feedback and are here to help. If you have any questions, concerns, or complaints about these Terms or the Services, please contact us:

**Culinage, Inc**

Email: contact@culinage.app (general inquiries)
Email: support@culinage.app (legal matters)

We will make our best effort to respond to your inquiry promptly and work with you to resolve any issues.

**Last Updated:** September 2025
**Version:** 1.0

Thank you for choosing Culinage to preserve your family's culinary heritage. We're honored to be part of your family's story.

[← Back to Culinage](/)

We use cookies for analytics. [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)

DeclineAccept

Whether your heading to university or college, are an avid home cook or a professional chef, we have plans for everyone!

Free

Free trial

Store 20 recipes

Use 20 smart imports

## Choose the plan that’s right for you

Everything you need to get started
to create your cookbook

## Free

### Starter

Secure recipe library

Start-from-scratch template

Up to 20 free recipes per book

Up to five customisable chapters

Submit recipe form

Preview flipbook up to 10 pages

Help guides

Download PDF

Perfect for family, friends
and individuals

## $19

### Premium

/per year

**Everything in Starter plus:**

2 premium templates valued $40USD

Unlimited recipes

Unlimited chapters

Unlimited flipbook pages

Invite unlimited contributors to
submit recipes

Upload personal images to your
recipe library

Hundreds of ready-made page templates

Ideal for groups, schools
and organisations

## $99

### Community

###

/per year

**Everything in Starter and Premium plus:**

Unlimited premium templates

Customised community recipe request form

Additional custom recipe form fields

Invite others to edit layout & recipes

Collaborate with team members inside layout
in real-time

Generate fundraiser tips, tools and templates

### Yearly subscription, cancel anytime

* ![Cookbook and cooking - create cookbooks signup](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e9e3cdf1f6c1904627fd603/1777316019455-LJ8HBGESVNZYHKNFZ2KT/unsplash-image-BKGl7jJTtHc.jpg)

  ## Be the creator that you are

  [Get started](https://app.createcookbooks.com/signup)

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5e9e3cdf1f6c1904627fd603/a120b2bc-df06-4e43-b1bf-f5fc53d5173b/bookdelish+books.png)

## Need design support?

Our partners at [Book Delish](https://bookdelish.com) specialise in providing top-tier design support in helping you create a beautiful cookbook.

[Learn more](https://bookdelish.com/how-it-works)
